**2. Find the resultant force vector.**

The resultant force, $$\textbf{R}$$, is the sum of the individual force vectors $$\textbf{F}_1$$ and $$\textbf{F}_2$$.

$$\textbf{R} = \langle 45, 0 \rangle + \langle 47.128, 21.976 \rangle$$

$$\textbf{R} = \langle 92.128, 21.976 \rangle$$

$$\tan(\theta) = \frac{21.976}{92.128}$$

$$\theta \approx 13.416^\circ$$

*   **Direction angle from the positive x-axis:** **13.42°**
